ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song (e.g., pop, rock, jazz) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song has explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song (1-100) */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the song */,
  "explicit_content_warning" TEXT /* Warning message for explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's official website */,
  "active_years" TEXT /* Years the artist has been active */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Artists or genres that influenced the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country or region of origin for the genre */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Genres that influenced the current genre */,
  "popular_artists" TEXT /* List of popular artists in the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song (0-11, where 0=C, 1=C#, 2=D, etc.) */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (0=minor, 1=major) */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song (e.g., 4/4, 3/4) */,
  "duration_minutes" REAL /* Duration of the song in minutes */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence of the tempo detection (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* User's review of the song */,
  "rating_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the review */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
